001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.dao;
002
003import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData;
004import androidx.room.Dao;
005import androidx.room.Insert;
006import androidx.room.Query;
007import androidx.room.Update;
008import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.Incubator;
009import java.util.List;
010
011@Dao
012public interface IncubatorDao {
013
014  @Insert
015  long insert(Incubator incubator);
016
017  @Update
018  void update(Incubator incubator);
019
020  // No @Delete — use @Update to set active=0 for soft deletion.
021
022  @Query("SELECT * FROM incubator WHERE active=1 ORDER BY name ASC")
023  LiveData<List<Incubator>> selectAll();
024
025  @Query("SELECT * FROM incubator WHERE incubator_id=:id")
026  LiveData<Incubator> select(long id);
027}
